name: Lentil Rice Burgers
recipeIngredient: 1/2 cup Rice, white; cooked and cooled
1 small Sweet potato; peeled and cooked -- minced
8 Spinach leaves; rinsed -- blanched, finely shredded
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine rice, lentils, sweet potato, spinach, and mushrooms in a large bowl.
2. Add soy sauce, salt, and pepper.
3. Add bread crumbs and cilantro; mix well.
4. Refrigerate for 15 to 39 minutes.
5. Form mixture into 6 to 8 patties.
6. Oil a vegetable grill generously. These patties tend to stick.
7. Grill for 3 to 4 minutes on each side until medium brown.
- Makes 6 to 8 patties.
- Variation: Instead of burgers, form the mixture into small balls and grill until browned. Serve as a snack with a dipping sauce or add to pasta with your favorite sauce. Per patty: 131 calories; 4g protein; 0.6g fat; 26g carbohydrates; 0 cholesterol; 286mg sodium; 3g fiber.
